course_title: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION AND HEALTH IN AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
description: Physical, biological and social nature of animal agriculture systems and their improvement in developing countries; analysis of the state of livestock research and development in the developing countries and the world role of U.S. animal agriculture.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: DY SCI/​AN SCI  101,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  151,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101, or (BIOCORE 381and382), or graduate/professional standing
